# Safe-Spend
# https://safe-spend.dev
# Spending governance for AI agents

## Overview
Safe-Spend provides policy-based spending governance for autonomous AI agents. Fund a spending pool, define guardrails, and your agent spends within them — with every dollar, every decision, and every receipt logged.

## Key Features
- Segregated spending accounts for AI agents
- Policy engine with per-transaction limits, daily/weekly/monthly caps, vendor allowlists, category restrictions
- Dual authorization with Agent Authority Vault
- HMAC-signed webhook notifications
- Full audit trail and transaction history

## API Integration

### SDK Initialization
```python
from safespend import SafeSpendClient

client = SafeSpendClient(api_key="ss_live_***")
pool = client.create_spending_pool(name="Marketing Agent", balance_cents=50000)
```

### LangChain Integration
```python
from safespend.langchain import SafeSpendTool

spend_tool = SafeSpendTool(client=client, pool_id=pool.id)
# Agent automatically checks budget before spending
```

### Authorization Flow
1. Agent requests authorization via AAV
2. AAV validates identity and permissions
3. Safe-Spend checks spending policy
4. Transaction proceeds if both authorize

## Architecture
- Backend: Python/FastAPI
- Frontend: React 19 (Vite)
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Hosted on Railway

## Owner
AgenticTrust — https://agentictrust.app
